case_title: JAY FINK VS. NORTH STAR CAFE/RUBBER LEGS INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,000.00 FILED BY FINK, JAY AS TO DEFENDANT NORTH STAR CAFE/RUBBER LEGS INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-23-2011 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF FINK, JAY AS TO DEFENDANT NORTH STAR CAFE/RUBBER LEGS INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-23-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FINK, JAY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT NORTH STAR CAFE/RUBBER LEGS INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED SERVED FEB-22-2011, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT NORTH STAR CAFE/RUBBER LEGS INC.
